issue.title: Cut and publish Flow 0.1.5 to npm
issue.summary: Demo ready work item for Flow dashboard.

workerRuns.summary: Workflow setup is merged, but publishing cannot proceed until npm package settings pass account 2FA and npm trusted publishing is configured. npm CLI is unauthenticated; npm web is on the security-key 2FA page for @camden-lowrance/flow settings.
blockers: Approve npm security-key 2FA in Chrome, or provide npm CLI auth with package write access.

workerResults.summary: Workflow setup is merged, but publishing cannot proceed until npm package settings pass account 2FA and npm trusted publishing is configured. npm CLI is unauthenticated; npm web is on the security-key 2FA page for @camden-lowrance/flow settings.
blockers: Approve npm security-key 2FA in Chrome, or provide npm CLI auth with package write access.
workerResults.nextPickup: After npm 2FA/auth, run npx npm@latest trust github @camden-lowrance/flow --repo camden-lowrance/flow --file publish.yml --allow-publish --yes, then bump to 0.1.5 and create release v0.1.5.
